groundingDensity: moderate — chapter was already well-grounded with named characters, institutions, and plague vocabulary; enrichment focused on material texture, institutional specificity, and geographic anchoring

scenes.title: The Sanctum
scenes.summary: Material specificity (mahogany desk, brass paperweight, iron-banded door, glass specimen jars, alchemical chalk, flagstone, oak table, slate board), institutional anchoring (Kirin Tor hand, Dalaran violet gone to charcoal, folded-sleeve cut, Violet Citadel lectures, restricted-section work), geographic placement (Caer Darrow, Jandice's levels), specimen enrichment (clear reagent, working samples), named villages (Andorhal's granary, Millhaven's dead livestock, farmhouse north of the trade road)

scenes.title: The Duel
scenes.summary: Institutional precision (Council of Six twice in narration, Violet Citadel twice, faculty committees, Kirin Tor sending stone, Kirin Tor notation), material texture (cold oak, flagstone, vellum, leather-bound folio, specimen boxes in Kel'Thuzad's careful hand), geographic anchoring (Andorhal's grain yards, farmsteads along the trade road, Millhaven's pyres, farmhouse north of Andorhal, Darrowmere, chambers in Dalaran), character detail (Dalaran blue cuff, Sylvanas's blood at the ridge above Millhaven, cramped field script vs. precise Kirin Tor notation), ward infrastructure (ward-lines under flagstone, old ward-lines deeper than the room's fed by Caer Darrow foundations), narrative chain (Andorhal grain to this desk — one continuous act of will)

scenes.title: Sylvanas's Approach
scenes.summary: All 1:1 noun replacements respecting Anti-Bloat Rule — staccato tension preserved. Alchemical chalk, Dalaran blue, ward-lines (3x), flagstone, Scholomance's old protections, runic threshold, iron door (2x), entered Scholomance. No expansion of fragments or short sentences.

constraintsObeyed.antiBloat: Scene 3 staccato fully preserved. 'Stair. Landing. Stair again.' untouched. No fragment expansion anywhere.
constraintsObeyed.antiSpoonfeeding: No subtext made explicit. Sylvanas reference stays oblique. Kel'Thuzad's appetite shown through composure slip, not labeled.
constraintsObeyed.antiWiki: Dialogue unchanged except where characters naturally reference shared institutions. No lore injection into shorthand speech.
constraintsObeyed.passiveReality: All grounding through physical objects characters interact with. No narrator history paragraphs.
constraintsObeyed.invisibleVerb: No standard verbs replaced with domain jargon.
